mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rental_request (asset_id, user_id, request_date, planned_due_date, purpose, status) VALUES (#{assetId}, #{userId}, #{requestDate}, #{plannedDueDate}, #{purpose}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, a.name as assetName, a.serial_number as assetSerial, u.email as userEmail, u.name as userName, u.department as userDepartment, p.email as processedByEmail, c.use_ocr as useOcr FROM rental_request r JOIN asset a ON r.asset_id = a.id JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN users p ON r.processed_by = p.id WHERE r.id = #{id}

SELECT r.*, a.name as assetName, a.serial_number as assetSerial, u.email as userEmail, u.name as userName, u.department as userDepartment, c.use_ocr as useOcr FROM rental_request r JOIN asset a ON r.asset_id = a.id JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.status = #{status} ORDER BY r.request_date DESC

SELECT r.*, a.name as assetName, a.serial_number as assetSerial, u.email as userEmail, u.department as userDepartment FROM rental_request r JOIN asset a ON r.asset_id = a.id JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.request_date DESC

SELECT r.*, a.name as assetName, a.serial_number as assetSerial, u.email as userEmail, u.name as userName, u.department as userDepartment, p.email as processedByEmail, c.use_ocr as useOcr FROM rental_request r JOIN asset a ON r.asset_id = a.id JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN users p ON r.processed_by = p.id ORDER BY r.request_date DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE rental_request SET status = #{status}, processed_by = #{processedBy}, process_date = #{processDate}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, ocr_data = #{ocrData} WHERE id = #{id}
